title: conostylis aurea
intro: Conostylis aurea, also known as the Golden Conostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae, native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The herbal preparations of Conostylis aurea include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and infections.
